categories.name: High-Performance Viral Hooks
categories.description: Consistently stop the scroll by triggering curiosity and promising immediate value.
formulas: Nobody is talking about THIS...
You’re doing [something] wrong – here’s why
3 secrets [industry] pros don’t want you to know
This will save you HOURS...
Here’s the fastest way to [desirable outcome]
categories.why_it_works: They trigger curiosity, leverage FOMO, and promise quick, concrete value.

categories.name: The Problem-Solution Hook
categories.description: Identify a pain point, then promise a solution.
formulas: If you're struggling to [problem], here's what you're doing wrong...
Still getting [negative result]? These [number] changes will fix that...
Your [thing] isn't [result] because you're missing this...
You’re doing [something] wrong – here’s why
categories.why_it_works: Qualifies the audience immediately and promises value.

categories.name: The Number Hook
categories.description: Specific numbers create curiosity and set clear expectations.
formulas: [number] signs you're about to be [outcome] (most people miss #[number])
I tried [number] [category]. Here are the only [number] that worked...
[number] words that will change how people see you...
3 secrets [industry] pros don’t want you to know
categories.why_it_works: Feels concrete and digestible. Promises actionable info.

categories.name: The Contradiction Hook
categories.description: Challenge common beliefs to create cognitive dissonance.
formulas: Everything you know about [topic] is wrong...
The worst [topic] advice that everyone follows...
Why [action] is making you [negative outcome]...
Nobody is talking about THIS...
categories.why_it_works: Forces viewers to question assumptions and stick around for the explanation.

categories.name: The Secret/Insider Hook
formulas: What [type of people] know that you don't...
The [platform/industry] change [authority] doesn't want you to know...
Industry secret: This is how we really [goal]...
3 secrets [industry] pros don’t want you to know
categories.why_it_works: People want to feel like they have exclusive access.

categories.name: The Time-Sensitive Hook
categories.description: Create urgency or reference current events.
formulas: This trend will be dead by [time], but here's how to use it now...
If you don't do this before [year/event] ends...
While everyone's distracted by [event], smart people are doing this...
This will save you HOURS...
categories.why_it_works: Triggers FOMO and compels immediate action.

categories.name: The Personal Story Hook
categories.description: Share a relatable experience or transformation.
formulas: I was [negative state] [time] ago. Here's what changed everything...
My biggest mistake cost me [amount]. Don't make the same one...
The day I realized I was the problem...

categories.name: The Question Hook
categories.description: Ask a question the audience desperately wants answered.
formulas: Want to know the real reason you're not [positive outcome]?
Ever wonder why some people seem naturally [trait]?
Curious how some creators [achievement] overnight?
categories.why_it_works: Creates an open loop in the viewer's mind that demands closure.

categories.name: The 'I Tried Everything' Hook
categories.description: Lead with exhaustion and failure before revealing the discovery. Creates immediate empathy.
formulas: I tried EVERY [solution] until I found this...
After [number] failed attempts, THIS finally worked...
Nothing worked for my [problem] until I tried this...
I gave up on [category] apps — until this one changed everything
categories.why_it_works: Audience who has already tried and failed self-identifies immediately. The promise of a real solution after real struggle feels earned, not salesy.

categories.name: The Before/After Habit List Hook (Fekri Format)
categories.description: List X habits/actions that led to a transformation, softly plugging the product as one of them. Show real before/after proof.
formulas: [number] habits that helped me [positive outcome] 🍃
What I changed to finally fix my [problem] (this actually works)
[number] things I do daily that eliminated my [symptom]
The [number]-step routine that cleared my [problem] in [timeframe]
categories.why_it_works: Feels like genuine lifestyle advice, not an ad. The product is one of many habits so it feels organic. Before/after proof adds credibility.

categories.name: The Bold Claim Hook
categories.description: Make a specific, almost unbelievable claim backed up with on-screen proof or stats.
formulas: The app that fixed my [problem] in [short timeframe]
I lost [specific result] in [timeframe] using just this one tool
[Claim] — I have the screenshots to prove it
This [product] gave me [specific result] I couldn't get in [X years of trying]
categories.why_it_works: Specific numbers create credibility. The implied proof in 'I have receipts' triggers curiosity to see the evidence.

categories.name: The Social Challenge / Bet Hook
categories.description: Frame the journey as a challenge or bet with someone else. Creates narrative tension and a rooting interest.
formulas: My [sibling/friend] bet me $[amount] I couldn't [achieve goal] — then I showed them this 😏
I challenged myself to [goal] for [timeframe]. Here's what happened...
My doctor said I couldn't [outcome]. I proved them wrong with this.
categories.why_it_works: Social stakes create narrative tension. Viewers root for the underdog and stay to see the outcome.

categories.name: The Condition-Specific Identity Hook
categories.description: Target a viewer's exact diagnosis or condition by name. Hyper-specific identity targeting makes the viewer feel the content was made FOR them.
formulas: If you have [specific condition], you need to hear this...
Things people without [condition] don't understand 😮‍💨
POV: you have [condition] and you just found out about [solution]
Rating [product/food/habit] as someone with [specific condition]
Does [common trigger] bother anyone else with [condition]?
[Number] bizarre [condition] hacks my [doctor/specialist] taught me (that actually work)
categories.why_it_works: The algo tunes to the exact audience dealing with this condition. Conversion rates are much higher because the viewer feels the product was built specifically for their situation.
